questionHtml:
At which stage of meiosis are bivalents formed?

A. Interphase

B. Prophase I

C. Prophase II

D. Metaphase II

meta.title: At which stage of meiosis are bivalents formed? A. Interphase B. Prophase I C. Prophase II D. Metaphase II
